sql: SELECT DISTINCT id, name, status FROM users WHERE status = #{status} AND department_id IN (#{deptIds}) ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
<choose>
    <when test="fields != null and fields.size() > 0">
        <foreach collection="fields" item="field" separator=", ">
            ${field}
        </foreach>
    </when>
    <when test="useEmail == true">
        email, status
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        id, name, status
    </otherwise>
</choose>
FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
